india.title: What really happened to Reckless Ben’s GoFundMe amid the missing LEGO collection controversy?
india.summary: The Bricks & Minifigs and Reckless Ben dispute began with claims that a $200,000 Star Wars LEGO collection was never returned to the Mansell family. The controversy later expanded into arrests, public accusations, lawsuits, store closures, and a major fundraising campaign. The latest development saw the Mansell GoFundMe page restored, while the legal battle continues ahead of a scheduled June 30 hearing.
